SEARCH
Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element

Class Rect

java.lang.Object
net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Keyed
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.AbstractElement<Rect>
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.Rect
All Implemented Interfaces:
Element
public class Rect extends AbstractElement<Rect>
Represents a rectangle with up to four colors (one for each corner)

      key - Unique identifier for element
      pos - Position of element
      anchor - Anchor for element
      offset - Offset of element
      size - Size of element
      color - Corner colors of element

    • getColors

      public int[] getColors()
      Get the colors for all four corners.

      Array index starts at top left and iterates counterclockwise.

      Returns:
      Array of colors of all four corners
